title: Summary: Turn 822
content: Memory: Requirement to integrate KnowledgeBase with Obsidian is ambiguous. Current project (Java, ~40 files) has no Obsidian dependency. Three options proposed: (1) export to Obsidian vault (Markdown with [[wiki-link]] and frontmatter), (2) import from vault (parse MD files), (3) bidirectional sync via Obsidian REST API. User must pick a direction.
